fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Hegota devnet-0 to be based on glamsterdam-devnet-4 scope + FOCIL
Target: hegota-devnet-0 launch end of May, contingent on glamsterdam-devnet-4 stability

client_updates.highlight: Teku: new Docker image with all Gloas/ePBS fixes merged; another image imminent
Lighthouse: working implementation but orphaning blocks ~1-2 per epoch; under investigation
EL clients (Besu, ethrex) blocked on BAL instability; CL clients (Teku, Lodestar, Lighthouse) sync-ready

testing_progress.highlight: Public FOCIL devnet blocked until glamsterdam-devnet-4 (and underlying BAL) stabilizes
EL has basic test vectors and hive tests passing; no proper CL testing yet

spec_changes.highlight: Non-finality: inclusion list enforcement agreed to be disabled during non-finality
If frame transactions ship with Hegota, inclusion list validation logic will change to check a fixed index at payload end

action_items.action: Investigate 1.7 alpha spec (FCU V4 / ePBS changes) and share findings; rebase FOCIL on latest spec before devnet-0
Rebase Besu FOCIL branch on top of glamsterdam-devnet-4

decisions.decision: Hegota devnet-0 will target glamsterdam-devnet-4 as its base
Outdated FOCIL testing checklist to be removed from repo; replace with auto-generated version
FOCIL breakout calls continue; too early to consolidate into ACDC

targets.target: End of May — hegota-devnet-0 launch (if glamsterdam-devnet-4 stable within 1-2 weeks)
